exportKeystore.chooseAccountsDesc: Select which accounts you want to export. They will be encrypted and exported into a Keystore file
exportKeystore.chooseContactsDesc: Select which address you want to export. They will be encrypted and exported into a Keystore file
exportKeystore.passwordVerifyDesc: Please enter your Cubensis Connect password to confirm that it's really you
exportKeystore.passwordVerifyImportantNote: <attention>Attention:</attention> this password will also be used to encrypt the resulting file. If you forget it, you won't be able to restore your accounts.
exportKeystore.warningModalDesc: Ledger and email accounts cannot be exported

forgotPassword.attentionMessage: To reset the password, you need to delete all accounts from Cubensis Connect, set a new password, import each of your account again from the Seed phrase.
forgotPassword.continueMessage: To continue, type this into the field below
forgotPassword.warningMessage: If you have not saved the Seed phrase or Private key, then you will not be able to recover access to your account.

info.keepUp: Cubensis Connect — is the safest way to interact with third-party web resources with DecentralChain-integrated functionality or DApps. Using Cubensis Connect, you can sign transactions and remain safe from malicious sites.

ledgerConnectModal.title: Connecting...

newAccount.acceptTerms: I have read and agree with the
